JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER, CLERKS JULIE WILSON/NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER PATTY HUBBLE. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF NOV-18-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-18-2002 AT 9:25 AM IN DEPT. 218, LORETTA M. NORRIS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEX, GEORGE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 201 LEAVENWORTH STREET #411 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,388.48 RENT, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,487.48, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS PER DIEM HOLD OVER OF $17.14. calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-22-2002 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause was assigned to Dept. 218 on November 18, 2002 from Dept. 206 Unlawful Detainer trial calendar, on line No. 19. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patrick Heard. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff N.N. Patel. There was no appearance by the Defendant, George Lex. Plaintiff, N. N. Patel was sworn and examined. Exhibit #1 - 3-day notice to pay rent was marked for identification and moved into evidence. Court takes evidence and ordered the following: Plaintiff to have possession of 201 Leavenworth Street, #411; Unlawful detainer damages totaling $1,388.48 and Costs: $99.00 and per diem hold over of $17.14. Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2002 Continued To Nov-18-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
